title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price launches first actively managed multi-token crypto ETF
message_html: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price launches first actively managed multi-token crypto ETF ...
snippet: T. Rowe Price's TKNZ Active Crypto ETF began trading Thursday after the firm filed for the product in October.

title: Fireblocks Integrates Circle Payment Rails Into Its Platform
message_html: Fireblocks Integrates Circle Payment Rails Into Its Platform ...
snippet: Circle’s Gateway and Circle Payments Network (CPN) are now natively accessible within Fireblocks’ stablecoin infrastructure, Fireblocks said in a Thursday (June 16) blog post.
